code:
%%{FinTech_TransactionQueue}
}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> ChallengeRequested: User initiates login

    ChallengeRequested --> ChallengeGenerated: Generate challenge
    ChallengeGenerated --> ChallengeExpired: TTL expires (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
    ChallengeExpired --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]: Challenge invalid

    ChallengeGenerated --> SignatureCreated: User signs challenge
    SignatureCreated --> SignatureVerified: Backend verifies
    SignatureCreated --> VerificationFailed: Invalid signature
    VerificationFailed --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]: Authentication failed

    SignatureVerified --> TokenGenerated: Create JWT
    TokenGenerated --> SessionCreated: Create session
    SessionCreated --> TokenActive: Token in use

    TokenActive --> TokenUsed: API request
    TokenUsed --> TokenActive: Update activity
    TokenActive --> TokenRefreshed: Refresh request
    TokenRefreshed --> NewTokenGenerated: Generate new token
    NewTokenGenerated --> TokenActive: Continue session

    TokenActive --> TokenExpired: 24h TTL
    TokenExpired --> TokenRefreshed: Auto-refresh
    TokenExpired --> SessionExpired: No refresh
    SessionExpired --> [FinTech_LedgerService]: Requires re-authentication

    TokenActive --> TokenRevoked: User logout
    TokenRevoked --> SessionTerminated: Clear session
    SessionTerminated --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]: Logged out

    TokenActive --> SessionRevoked: Admin action
    SessionRevoked --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: Force logout

    note right of ChallengeGenerated
        Challenge stored with:
        - 5 minute TTL
        - Unique nonce
        - Pubkey binding
    end note

    note right of TokenActive
        Token contains:
        - NOSTR pubkey
        - Session ID
        - Role (FinTech_AuthVault)
        - Issue/Expiry times
    end note

    note right of TokenRefreshed
        Refresh maintains:
        - Same session
        - Updated timestamps
        - Activity tracking
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要梳理一下FinTech系统的完整认证流程。从PaymentGateway发起登录，到最终会话终止，中间涉及Challenge机制、Token生命周期，还有Admin的强制登出功能。你能帮我画个状态图吗？
明白了，这是一个完整的认证状态机。我先确认一下：用户登录时从PaymentGateway触发ChallengeRequested，然后生成Challenge，这个Challenge有TTL过期机制对吧？过期后应该回到TransactionQueue？
对，ChallengeGenerated之后有两个分支：TTL过期到ChallengeExpired，或者用户完成签名到SignatureCreated。ChallengeExpired要标记为invalid并回到TransactionQueue。另外Challenge需要存储5分钟TTL、唯一nonce和公钥绑定。
好的，我把ChallengeGenerated的注释加上。然后签名验证分支：SignatureCreated到SignatureVerified是验证成功，还有一个VerificationFailed分支失败时也要回到TransactionQueue？
没错。验证通过后创建JWT到TokenGenerated，然后建立会话SessionCreated，进入TokenActive状态。TokenActive是核心状态，要包含NOSTR公钥、Session ID、Role信息、签发和过期时间。
已添加TokenActive的注释。我继续画TokenActive的流转：API请求到TokenUsed，然后可以回到TokenActive更新活动；还有Refresh request到TokenRefreshed，生成NewTokenGenerated后继续会话。这里Refresh要保持Same session？
是的，TokenRefreshed要保持相同会话、更新时间戳、记录活动跟踪。另外TokenActive还有24h TTL到TokenExpired，TokenExpired可以Auto-refresh回到TokenRefreshed，如果不刷新就到SessionExpired，需要重新认证到LedgerService。
还有两个终止分支需要确认：用户主动logout是TokenRevoked到SessionTerminated，然后到FraudDetection；Admin强制登出是SessionRevoked到AuthVault。这两个终点系统不一样，对吗？
完全正确。用户正常登出走FraudDetection记录审计，Admin强制操作走AuthVault做权限管控。图就这样，覆盖了从登录挑战到会话完整生命周期的所有状态流转。
